name: io.github.dirtcubeinteractive/specter-skills
description: Build your game backend by talking to your AI assistant. Inspect and configure Specter — the game backend platform — directly from chat: players, economy, progression, leaderboards, tournaments, battle passes, and real-time multiplayer.

environmentVariables.name: SPECTER_ALLOW_MUTATIONS
environmentVariables.description: Set 'true' to enable the create/mutate tools (gated behind confirmation)

environmentVariables.name: SPECTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Client api-key. Not needed after browser sign-in (the dev key from login is reused)

environmentVariables.name: SPECTER_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Auto-detected from sign-in. Set only to pin one project when your org has several

environmentVariables.name: SPECTER_ADMIN_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Admin token for CI / non-interactive use instead of browser sign-in
